variants: Oluwadamilola Ajayi is an advocate for local heritage, serving as the Custodian of Elmspire Historical Society, where they work to protect and promote the area’s history. With a strong academic background, Oluwadamilola has published work with Sunset Galleon Press, showcasing their insights. Their research journey has been shaped by mentorship from Mircea Popa, guiding their scholarly development. Notably, Oluwadamilola holds the Dreamscape Mixologist Badge, reflecting their innovative skills in crafting immersive experiences. Funding for their initiatives largely comes from the Sunflare Momentum Society, which supports their projects and community outreach.
